score.riskSummary: Moderate risk — some gaps detected. Top concerns: Catalog active for 13 years.

royaltyGap.disclaimer: Estimates only. Based on streaming activity and platform coverage. Verify with your distributor and PRO.

indicators.title: Extended royalty verification recommended
indicators.description: Catalog active for 13 years across 4 releases.

steps: Find your country's PRO at cisac.org/find-a-society
Register as a songwriter and composer
Register all your works in the PRO database
Verify reciprocal agreements with SOCAN, ASCAP, GEMA and PRS
proGuide.note: CISAC is the international confederation of PROs. Their directory lists every PRO worldwide.

bestVerifiedRelease.reasonSelected: Single — score 70/100 (artwork present, recent release); evaluated 4 candidates

globalMusicFootprint.reachNarrative: Available in 156 territories (93% of global markets).

royalteAI.observation: Platform identity is verified and consistent — the foundation of a professionally managed independent catalog.
royalteAI.priority: With core infrastructure verified, the most significant risk is change over time — gaps that emerge silently as the catalog evolves.
royalteAI.positiveSignal: Distribution verified in 156 Apple Music territories.
royalteAI.nextAction: Establish continuous monitoring across identity, publishing, and catalog status — the infrastructure that exists today will evolve, and visibility into those changes is what protects long-term value.
royalteAI.executiveInsight: Platform identity is verified and catalog presence is established — the core signals of a professionally managed independent artist infrastructure. The next phase is not discovery — it is protection. Infrastructure that exists today will evolve, and visibility into those changes is what preserves long-term value. Establishing continuous monitoring across identity, publishing, catalog status, and territory availability ensures future changes are detected before they affect visibility, attribution, or royalty collection.

healthScore.summary: Your music backend is in strong shape.

strengths.title: Complete catalog delivery verified
strengths.description: All identified recordings have corresponding release linkage in reviewed sources.

concerns: Monitoring not active for this scan

executiveBrief.executiveSummary: Your music backend infrastructure has been assessed and received an overall Health Score of 90/100, rated B — Strong Foundation with Minor Gaps. Identity scored 95, publishing 100, catalog 98, and metadata 100, with coverage at 57 and confidence at 60. 1 documented strength reinforces a stable foundation, with 0 opportunities identified for further improvement. The outlook is positive, with focused work on the noted gaps positioning the catalog for sustained growth.
executiveBrief.executiveNarrative: The backend infrastructure reflects strong maturity at a Health Score of 90, with minor gaps. No material risks have been identified in the current assessment. Optimisation opportunities are limited under current conditions. Long term, the foundation is well positioned to compound value over time.

topStrengths.title: Complete catalog delivery verified
topStrengths.description: All identified recordings have corresponding release linkage in reviewed sources.

executiveBrief.confidenceStatement: This assessment is based on partially verified intelligence.
executiveBrief.aiExecutiveInsight: Based on the intelligence assembled, this catalog demonstrates verifiable strength in catalog. No material risks have been identified in the current assessment. Addressing "Schedule Full Backend Review" would materially improve backend infrastructure health. Executing the recommended next step will materially improve the Health Score from 90.
executiveBrief.recoveryNarrative: No specific infrastructure improvement opportunities were identified from reviewed sources.
